name: codex-usage-tracker
description: Unofficial local Codex usage dashboard and MCP diagnostics from local session logs.

interface.shortDescription: Local Codex usage dashboard, MCP diagnostics, and token-waste investigations
interface.longDescription: Unofficial independent project, not made by, affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or supported by OpenAI. Reads local Codex session logs to power a local dashboard, MCP tools, allowance diagnostics, token-waste investigations, and shareable aggregate reports without uploading logs.
defaultPrompt: Look through my usage for token waste
Check whether my weekly allowance changed
